'''Alzar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Thanium sector/Legends|Thanium sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Alzarian/Legends|Alzarian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the world was devastated during the [[Stenax Massacres]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==History==
Discovered at the birth of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the world would be forgotten for a brief time before being settled by [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists during the [[Tionese War]]. The native Alzarians, ruled over by a [[Alzarian monarchy|monarchy]], accepted the colonists and lived in peace for several millennia. Engulfed in the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Empire]] of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]], and under [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] control [[Mandalorian Wars|before that]], Alzar eventually joined the Republic following the defeat of the controlling [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="TEA" />

Unable to avoid domination, the Alzarians were wrapped into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] against the Republic in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and remained in Separatist space until their defeat in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] then absorbed the world under its area of control.<ref name="TEA" /> [[King/Legends|King]] [[Gokus]] purchased a set of droids during Imperial rule that would eventually aid in the defeat of the Empire years later. These droids, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] would assist the King in the recovery of his kidnapped child, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Plooz]].<ref name="LIT" />

Following [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Death/Legends|death]], the world was [[Invasion of Alzar|invaded]] by the barbarous [[Stenax]] and the native Alzarians were [[Stenax Massacres|massacred]]. Following the end of the attacks, the surviving Alzarians remained under the watchful eye of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] who had taken the planet to further his [[Zsinj's Empire|empire]]. Following Zsinj's defeat, Alzar, like many worlds in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]], remained neutral during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] reign. When the rest of the sector was invaded during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the planet was cut off from the rest of the galaxy, forced to fend for itself against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders. As of [[137 ABY]], Alzar was located in [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Alzar was created for the [[Droids (1986) 4|fourth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars Droids'']] series, published in [[1986]]. It was later noted in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
